title: cheilanthes farinosa var. sulphurea
intro: Cheilanthes farinosa var. sulphurea, also known as the sulphur-leaved rustyback, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cheilanthes farinosa var. sulphurea include soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile remedy for various health issues.
